      May 8, 2026 12:48

      fix(install): preferences.md leaks raw shell on macOS (bash 3.2) #1

      Merged Ashkaan  merged 1 commit

      Summary

      • write_preferences() used $(case ... esac) inline within an unquoted heredoc. macOS ships bash 3.2.57 (2007 — Apple won't ship GPLv3), whose parser fails on the case patterns' closing parens inside command substitution within a heredoc — producing the syntax errors below and writing literal echo lines into the user's preferences.md inste…

      from safishamsi May 7, 2026 11:52

      New backends: AWS Bedrock + Google Workspace (v0.7.9)

      Two new integrations landed in v0.7.9.

      AWS Bedrock

      You can now run graphify extractions through AWS Bedrock - no API key needed, uses your existing IAM credentials via the standard AWS provider chain.

      graphify extract ./docs --backend bedrock

      Set AWS_PROFILE or AWS_REGION and it auto-detects. Default model is anthropic.claude-3-5-sonnet-20241022-v2:0, ove…

      Read more

      Follow us on X + Discord community coming soon

      Hey everyone,

      [TypeScript] Add interface, enum, type alias, const literal, new_expression extraction #708

      Merged safishamsi  merged 1 commit

      [TypeScript] Add interface, enum, type alias, const literal, new_expression extraction

      Summary

      Bring TypeScript AST extraction to parity with Java and C# by adding the
      declaration types upstream graphify currently skips. Today, TypeScript codebases
      yield only class_declaration and function_declaration nodes — no
      interface, enum, type alias, modu…

      May 7, 2026 03:19

      feat: add .qmd file extension support #761

      Merged safishamsi  merged 1 commit

      This PR adds support for Quarto markdown (.qmd) files by routing them through the existing extract_markdown pipeline.

      Since .qmd files are largely compatible with standard Markdown, this change only adds .qmd support at the detection and dispatch layers.

      Changes included in this PR:

      • Add .qmd to document file extension detection
      • Update export lo…

      May 7, 2026 02:28

      Handle positional install platform names #759

      Merged safishamsi  merged 1 commit

      Fixes #755.

      graphify install --platform opencode works today, but graphify install opencode silently drops the positional platform and installs the default platform instead. That is especially confusing when someone runs graphify install opencode --help: it can write Claude files while looking like an OpenCode command.

      This makes the install par…

      May 7, 2026 02:28

      fix: extract CommonJS require() imports as EXTRACTED edges #753

      Merged safishamsi  merged 2 commits

      Summary

      The JS/TS extractor only handled ES import statements. CommonJS require() calls produced zero import edges, which forced the call-graph pass to mark every cross-file call in CJS Node.js codebases as INFERRED — even when the binding was a top-of-file destructured const { x } = require('./mod').

      This patch wires three patterns into _js_ext…

      Fix GRAPHIFY_OUT default for query/path/explain #758

      Merged safishamsi  merged 1 commit

      Fixes #756.

      The three graph lookup commands already accept --graph, but their default path still pointed at graphify-out/graph.json even when GRAPHIFY_OUT was set. That breaks shared-output and non-default output directory setups.

      This switches the default path for query, path, and explain to the existing GRAPHIFY_OUT setting, while leaving expl…
